hero.title: The future of natural regeneration
hero.subtitle: We are beings of electromagnetic nature. Harness the power of biophotonics and restore your body to its ideal balance. Polaris is your personal antenna for vital energy, developed on the foundations of Nikola Tesla and Georges Lakhovsky's research.

novak.title: A champion's standard.
novak.body: When you push the boundaries of human performance, recovery matters as much as training. Novak Djokovic, the greatest athlete of all time, uses Polaris as an essential part of his daily protocol for maintaining focus, inner peace, and physical regeneration.
novak.quote: One of the 10 things I never go anywhere without.

cards.title: Chronic fatigue
cards.body: Waking up exhausted despite 'enough' sleep? Your cells aren't getting sufficient energy for regeneration during the night.

cards.title: Persistent pain
cards.body: Whether it's your spine, joints, or muscles, pain is a clear signal of blocked energy flow. Polaris opens those channels.

cards.title: Stress and pressure
cards.body: We live in a sea of artificial frequencies. Polaris neutralizes harmful environmental influences and restores peaceful sleep and sharp focus.

solution.title: Not magic.
solution.body: Polaris is not a remedy in the classical sense – it is a bio-antenna. Made from a special metal alloy, with nine rings precisely tuned to the Golden Ratio (Phi), it passively focuses vital energy from the environment and directs it into your body.

sport.title: Power for extreme challenges.
sport.body: Polaris Sport is not just a bigger disc – it's a more intense energy source. Designed for professional athletes who want faster tissue recovery after exertion. Accelerates toxin drainage, reduces inflammation, and restores muscle elasticity.

items.quote: The back pain that had been bothering me for years disappeared in three days. I couldn't believe it.
items.author: Milena K.

items.quote: I finally sleep through the night. I woke up rested this morning for the first time in months.
items.author: Dragan P.

items.quote: As a professional athlete, recovery is everything. Polaris has changed my training protocol.
items.author: Aleksandar M.

items.quote: My focus and concentration have dramatically improved. I recommend it to everyone.
items.author: Jelena T.

points.name: Root / First Chakra
points.title: Foundation of vitality and toxin elimination.
points.benefits: Support for urological health, relief from hemorrhoids and prostate issues. Strengthens core life energy and bodily stability.
points.position: Seated position or placed directly on the area

points.name: Sacral / Second Chakra
points.title: Center of hormonal balance.
points.benefits: Key point for gynecological health, menstrual cycle regulation, and fertility. Helps with urinary complaints and intestinal bloating.
points.position: Lying down, disc on lower abdomen

points.name: Solar Plexus / Third Chakra
points.title: Main reservoir of inner peace.
points.benefits: Immediately calms the stomach, regulates digestion and stress. Highly effective point for naturally lowering elevated blood pressure.
points.position: Disc above the stomach, lightly pressed

points.name: Heart / Fourth Chakra
points.title: Center of emotional balance and breath.
points.benefits: Support for heart and lung function. Helps with asthma, bronchitis, and feelings of tightness in the chest.
points.position: On the middle of the sternum

points.name: Throat / Fifth Chakra
points.title: Conductor of metabolism and rejuvenation.
points.benefits: Essential point for thyroid health. Stimulates detoxification and slows the aging processes of the body.
points.position: At the base of the neck, light pressure
points.note: La tiroides es el director del organismo – tratar también para un aspecto juvenil.

points.name: Third Eye / Sixth Chakra
points.title: Focus, intuition, and mental clarity.
points.benefits: Relieves headaches and sinusitis. Prepares the brain for deep and regenerative sleep.
points.position: On the center of the forehead — shorter exposure!

points.name: Crown / Seventh Chakra
points.title: Harmonization of the entire nervous system.
points.benefits: Helps with severe insomnia, cerebral disorders, and general disorientation. Restores the sense of unity with the body.
points.position: On the top of the head — shorter exposure!

items.title: Energizing water and food
items.body: Place a jug of water or a dish of food on Polaris for 30 minutes. The disc transforms the molecular structure, making water 'alive' and more easily digestible.

items.title: Plants and pets
items.body: Animals infallibly sense good energy. Plants watered with energized water grow up to 30% faster with noticeably greater leaf vitality.

items.title: Space cleansing
items.body: Keep the disc in the room you spend the most time in to neutralize harmful electromagnetic radiation (EMF) and negative environmental influences.

items.title: Obesidad y metabolismo
items.body: El tratamiento del centro abdominal y el 5.° chakra (garganta) acelera el metabolismo. Usar 2–3 veces al día para una activación metabólica óptima.

items.title: Circulación
items.body: Coloque las plantas de los pies sobre el disco Polaris durante 10–15 minutos. Estimula la circulación periférica en todo el cuerpo, de abajo hacia arriba.

items.title: Neutralización del estrés
items.body: Coloque ambas palmas sobre el disco o el disco sobre el tercer chakra (plexo solar). Calma instantáneamente el sistema nervioso y regula la presión arterial.

alert.title: Aviso importante
alert.body: Puede experimentar sensaciones como aumento del dolor, hormigueo o calor. Esto es una señal de que el organismo está comenzando a corregir el trastorno. No se preocupe, las sensaciones desaparecerán a medida que se elimine el problema.

pageHero.title: What is
pageHero.subtitle: The answer is not in magic. The answer is in physics.

science.title: A return to the fundamentals of electromagnetic nature.
science.body: We are electromagnetic beings. Every cell in your body emits and receives electromagnetic signals — this is the language your organs use to communicate. When that flow stops, imbalance manifests as pain, fatigue, and illness. Polaris is here to re-establish that connection, passively and without chemistry.

mechanism.title: Nine rings.
mechanism.body: The nine rings of Polaris, crafted from a special alloy and precisely tuned to the Golden Ratio (Phi = 1.618...), act as a passive bio-antenna. Like a lens focusing scattered light into a point, Polaris collects vital energy (Prana/Qi) from the environment and directs it into your cells.

detail1.label: 9 rings
detail1.body: Each ring proportionally smaller by the Phi ratio, creating a perfect harmonic series.

detail2.label: Passive technology
detail2.body: No batteries, no electricity, no radiation. Only geometry and alloy.

detail3.label: Metal alloy
detail3.body: A special combination of metals optimized for bioelectromagnetic resonance.

heritage.eyebrow: Standing on the shoulders of giants
heritage.title: The legacy of
heritage.intro: Polaris was not born in a vacuum. It stands on the foundations laid by two visionaries whose work was far ahead of their time.
heritage.conceptBody: In 1925, Lakhovsky put forward a revolutionary thesis: every living cell functions as a small oscillating circuit. When a cell is healthy, it oscillates at its natural frequency. Polaris helps return cells to that optimal frequency.

people.name: Nikola Tesla
people.contribution: Tesla systematically explored resonance as a fundamental force of nature. He understood that every object has its own natural frequency and that energy can be transmitted without wires.
people.quote: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration.

people.name: Georges Lakhovsky
people.contribution: A French engineer of Russian origin who revolutionized the understanding of biology. Author of The Secret of Life, describing his theory that all living cells are oscillating circuits.
people.quote: Every living cell is like a small radio transmitter and receiver that constantly emits and receives waves.

expert.name: Dr. Dino Tomić
expert.role: Gynecologist · Bioenergetics specialist · Founder of Polaris
expert.title: From classical gynecology to quantum harmony.
expert.body: After twenty years as a specialist gynecologist, Dr. Tomić began to notice what medical literature does not say: many chronic health problems had no structural cause that conventional medicine could solve. This led him to research bioenergetics, quantum biology and electromagnetic therapies.
expert.body2: Polaris is not a medicine. It is a tool I designed to give patients back what has always belonged to them — the power of self-healing.
expert.quote: I did not abandon medicine. I expanded it. Polaris allows the patient to become an active participant in their own healing, rather than a passive recipient of therapy.

pageHero.subtitle: Miles de usuarios satisfechos. Estos son algunos de sus testimonios originales.

items.quote: I am 67 years old and suffered from insomnia for years. Doctors kept telling me it was normal for my age. Polaris proved that it doesn't have to be.

pageHero.title: We're here
pageHero.subtitle: Have a question? Write to us or browse the FAQ below.

items.question: Does Polaris have batteries or electrical power?
items.answer: No. Polaris is a completely passive device — no batteries, no cables, no electrical power of any kind. It works solely through the geometry and metal alloy it is made from, with no external energy source.

items.question: Does Polaris emit electromagnetic radiation?
items.answer: No. Polaris is a passive bio-antenna, meaning it emits no radiation. Instead, like an optical lens that directs light, it collects and focuses naturally occurring frequencies already present in the environment — it does not create them.

items.question: Can children use it?
items.answer: Yes. Polaris is safe for use by children of all ages. As it is completely passive and emits no signals, there are no contraindications for children. We recommend shorter sessions (10–15 minutes) for young children, with parental supervision.

items.question: What is the lifespan of Polaris?
items.answer: Unlimited. Because Polaris has no moving parts, electronics, or materials that wear or degrade, its geometry and resonant properties remain intact forever. A Polaris purchased once is a lifelong investment.

items.question: How long should it be used?
items.answer: The standard recommendation is 20–30 minutes per day on the chosen area. For acute pain, 3×15 minute sessions deliver fast results. For chronic conditions, regular once-daily use over 30 days gives optimal effects.

items.question: When can I expect delivery?
items.answer: Delivery within 24 hours for Serbia. For the region (Bosnia, Croatia, Montenegro) 2–3 business days. For the rest of Europe 5–7 business days. Each order is tracked via a tracking code sent to your email.
